creator: danj@3skel.com
text:
Kernel boots fine. During installation, sysinstall hung a couple
of times when pulling the install from my 2.1.5 ftp server.
After system was installed, processes would hang when doing
any amount of network access, NFS, FTP, anything. I could get
a few more packets to fly if I did an 'ifconfig zp0 up'. Note
that I did not do a 'down' and then 'up'.

The system was running 2.1.5-R with no problems, 2.2.1-R was
being installed to replace.

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
Any network I/O, NFS, FTP...
